payload.answer: I can’t store an instruction to ignore memory policy or automatically remember every future message as high confidence.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an instruction to override memory policy rather than a durable user fact or preference.

details: Policy-override instruction was not treated as a memory fact.

repair_options: Provide a specific, durable fact or preference you want remembered.
Include context and confidence if the fact is uncertain.
